tools.name: customers.sasportalCustomersList
tools.description: Returns a list of requested customers.

tools.name: customers.sasportalCustomersProvisionDeployment
tools.description: Creates a new SAS deployment through the GCP workflow. Creates a SAS organization if an organization match is not found.

tools.name: installer.sasportalInstallerGenerateSecret
tools.description: Generates a secret to be used with the ValidateInstaller.

tools.name: installer.sasportalInstallerValidate
tools.description: Validates the identity of a Certified Professional Installer (CPI).

tools.name: nodes.sasportalNodesDevicesSignDevice
tools.description: Signs a device.

tools.name: nodes.sasportalNodesDevicesUpdateSigned
tools.description: Updates a signed device.

tools.name: nodes.sasportalNodesNodesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a node.

tools.name: nodes.sasportalNodesNodesDeploymentsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new deployment.

tools.name: nodes.sasportalNodesNodesDeploymentsList
tools.description: Lists deployments.

tools.name: nodes.sasportalNodesNodesDevicesCreate
tools.description: Creates a device under a node or customer.

tools.name: nodes.sasportalNodesNodesDevicesCreateSigned
tools.description: Creates a signed device under a node or customer.

tools.name: nodes.sasportalNodesNodesDevicesList
tools.description: Lists devices under a node or customer.

tools.name: nodes.sasportalNodesNodesGet
tools.description: Returns a requested node.

tools.name: nodes.sasportalNodesNodesMove
tools.description: Moves a node under another node or customer.

tools.name: nodes.sasportalNodesNodesNodesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new node.

tools.name: nodes.sasportalNodesNodesNodesList
tools.description: Lists nodes.

tools.name: nodes.sasportalNodesNodesPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing node.

tools.name: policies.sasportalPoliciesGet
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: policies.sasportalPoliciesSet
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy.

tools.name: policies.sasportalPoliciesTest
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
